title: Data passed to parent via effect
message: Handing data back to a parent from a useEffect costs your users an extra render.
help: Fetch the data in the parent and pass it down as a prop (or return it from the hook), instead of handing it back up through a prop callback in a useEffect. See https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect#passing-data-to-the-parent
